title: clematis japonica
intro: Clematis japonica, also known as the Japanese clematis or sweet autumn clematis, is a climbing plant species belonging to the Ranunculaceae family. The plant's roots have been used in traditional medicine for centuries, and they contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Consuming the roots has been associated with various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the roots are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness their medicinal properties.
